title: Unable to add cell comment to worksheet if there  is a table presest
author: dev-1603
body:
Hi ... i am trying to add cell comments to worksheet   but unable to do it if there is a table in the sheet it is setting sheet as blank if there is already a table present  below are 2 snaps 1st is table without  cell comment nd later the sheet if i add cell comment. please hep me with this 
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/53967786/90212775-ce967a80-de11-11ea-973f-5525e7dc3f7e.png)
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/53967786/90213001-5ed4bf80-de12-11ea-8430-12f5284549a6.png)
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/53967786/90213039-72802600-de12-11ea-9730-22f8595ec871.png)

comments.author: Vaigadre
comments.body: @dev-1603 did you find any resolution or workaround for this issue? As we are also facing this issue while putting comments table cells.

comments.author: ShraddhaJ11
comments.body: @Siemienik  Do you have any solution for this issue ?

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body:
It's the first time when I meet this problem. 
As far as I understood, adding a cell comment causes by removing a table?

Could I please to create a repo for this code?

If it is private, I'm able to respond by mail at exjs@siemienik.pl .


---
_I'm contributing ExcelJS just for. If you want you to know something more, go into #1500. 
I accept orders for the resolve of issues._

comments.author: ShraddhaJ11
comments.body: @Siemienik  I am adding cell comments on a existing sheet that is having a table. After adding the cell comments on a particular table's cell , whole sheet is becoming blank.

comments.author: GaryHyland
comments.body: Similar for me. Adding a comment (note) to a sheet cell within in a table causes corrupt XLS on open.

comments.author: zhannan-cn
comments.body: I'm having the same issue. After adding comments to cells, I encountered an error when opening the file with Microsoft Excel. After repairing, the cells are blank, but everything is normal when opening with WPS.

comments.author: Pintiboy
comments.body:
Yep, can confirm (4.4.0)
And it doesn't matter if the Cell is within the data table or not. There just has to be one on the same sheet.
